headline: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) Expands Brendan Coughlin’s Role To Oversee Commercial Banking
summary: Citizens Financial Group expanded President Brendan Coughlin’s role to include oversight of Commercial Banking. Coughlin now leads Consumer Banking, Private Bank, Wealth, and Commercial Banking, along with the Reimagine the Bank program. The change centralizes leadership across key businesses as the bank pursues modernization and operational transformation. Citizens Financial Group, ticker NYSE:CFG, recently traded at $72.39 and has delivered a 21.9% return year to date and 53.8% over the...
